mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.dim_product
AND product_status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND (product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR description ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR brand ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR category_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%'))
AND base_price >= #{minPrice} AND base_price <= #{maxPrice}
AND CASE WHEN #{inStock} = true THEN stock_status != 'OUT_OF_STOCK' ELSE stock_status = 'OUT_OF_STOCK' END
AND brand = #{brand}
AND (product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR brand ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR description ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT p.product_id as ID, p.product_id as product_id, p.product_name as name, p.description as description, p.brand as brand, p.category_name as category_name, p.primary_image_url as image_url, p.base_price as price, p.selling_price as selling_price, CASE WHEN p.stock_status != 'OUT_OF_STOCK' THEN true ELSE false END as in_stock, p.total_available_qty as available_qty, p.avg_rating as average_rating, p.review_count as review_count,
CASE WHEN p.product_name ILIKE #{searchTerm} THEN 100 WHEN p.product_name ILIKE CONCAT(#{searchTerm}, '%') THEN 80 WHEN p.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') THEN 60 WHEN p.brand ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') THEN 40 ELSE 20 END AS relevance
0 AS relevance
FROM hm_query.dim_product p
AND p.product_status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND (p.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR p.description ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR p.brand ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR p.category_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%'))
AND p.base_price >= #{minPrice} AND p.base_price <= #{maxPrice}
AND CASE WHEN #{inStock} = true THEN p.stock_status != 'OUT_OF_STOCK' ELSE p.stock_status = 'OUT_OF_STOCK' END
AND p.brand = #{brand}
AND (p.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR p.brand ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR p.description ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
ORDER BY relevance DESC
${pagination}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.dim_product
AND product_status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND similarity(product_name, #{searchTerm}) > 0.2
